entities.description: stress ng is a software tool used to run stress tests on the system s cpu and memory resources
arm cortex a76 is a type of processor core used in the system under test
arm cortex a55 is another type of processor core used in the system under test
100  represents the resource utilization level of the system s cpu and memory cores during the stress test

relations.description: stress ng is used to stress test the arm cortex a76 processor cores  measuring their resource usage
stress ng is used to stress test the arm cortex a55 processor cores  measuring their resource usage
stress ng causes the resource usage of the system s cores to reach 100  during the test
the arm cortex a76 and arm cortex a55 cores are both part of the system s processor architecture  with the stress test measuring their combined resource usage
